question_fr: De quelle mythologie vient le dieu Apollon ?
question_en: What mythology did the god 'Apollo' come from?
choices_fr: A) Romaine et espagnole | B) Grecque et romaine | C) Grecque et chinoise | D) Grecque, romaine et nordique
choices_en: A) Roman and Spanish | B) Greek and Roman | C) Greek and Chinese | D) Greek, Roman and Norse
explanation_fr: Apollon est un dieu commun aux mythologies grecque et romaine.
explanation_en: Apollo is a god shared by Greek and Roman mythology.

question_fr: Hel était la fille de quelle figure de la mythologie nordique ?
question_en: Hel was the daughter of which Norse Mythological figure?
choices_fr: A) Thor | B) Loki | C) Odin | D) Balder
choices_en: A) Thor | B) Loki | C) Odin | D) Balder
explanation_fr: Hel est la fille de Loki et gouverne le royaume des morts.
explanation_en: Hel is Loki's daughter and rules the realm of the dead.

question_fr: Dans la mythologie grecque, qui était la fille du roi Minos ?
question_en: In Greek Mythology, who was the daughter of King Minos?
choices_fr: A) Athéna | B) Ariane | C) Ariel | D) Alana
choices_en: A) Athena | B) Ariadne | C) Ariel | D) Alana
explanation_fr: Ariane a aidé Thésée à s'échapper du labyrinthe.
explanation_en: Ariadne helped Theseus escape the labyrinth.

question_fr: Quel est le nom du dieu grec des forgerons ?
question_en: What is the name of the Greek god of blacksmiths?
choices_fr: A) Dyntos | B) Héphaïstos | C) Vulcain | D) Artagatus
choices_en: A) Dyntos | B) Hephaestus | C) Vulcan | D) Artagatus
explanation_fr: Héphaïstos forgeait les armes des dieux sur l'Olympe.
explanation_en: Hephaestus forged the weapons of the gods on Olympus.

question_fr: Un minotaure est mi-humain mi-quoi ?
question_en: A minotaur is half human half what?
choices_fr: A) Vache | B) Taureau | C) Cheval | D) Aigle
choices_en: A) Cow | B) Bull | C) Horse | D) Eagle
explanation_fr: Le Minotaure avait un corps d'homme et une tête de taureau.
explanation_en: The Minotaur had a man's body and a bull's head.

question_fr: Quel est le nom du dieu grec des morts paisibles ?
question_en: What is the name of the Greek god of peaceful deaths?
choices_fr: A) Tartare | B) Thanatos | C) Hadès | D) Moros
choices_en: A) Tartarus | B) Thanatos | C) Hades | D) Moros
explanation_fr: Thanatos personnifiait la mort douce et paisible.
explanation_en: Thanatos personified gentle and peaceful death.

question_fr: Qui, dans la mythologie grecque, a mené les Argonautes à la recherche de la Toison d'or ?
question_en: Who in Greek mythology led the Argonauts in search of the Golden Fleece?
choices_fr: A) Castor | B) Jason | C) Dédale | D) Ulysse
choices_en: A) Castor | B) Jason | C) Daedalus | D) Odysseus
explanation_fr: Jason et les Argonautes ont navigué sur le navire Argo.
explanation_en: Jason and the Argonauts sailed on the ship Argo.

question_fr: Poséidon était le dieu de quoi ?
question_en: The greek god Poseidon was the god of what?
choices_fr: A) Guerre | B) La Mer | C) Soleil | D) Feu
choices_en: A) War | B) The Sea | C) Sun | D) Fire
explanation_fr: Poséidon régnait sur les mers et les océans.
explanation_en: Poseidon ruled over the seas and oceans.

question_fr: Quelles créatures mythologiques ont des visages de femmes et des corps de vautours ?
question_en: What mythological creatures have women's faces and vultures' bodies?
choices_fr: A) Sirènes | B) Harpies | C) Nymphes | D) Lilith
choices_en: A) Mermaids | B) Harpies | C) Nymph | D) Lilith
explanation_fr: Les Harpies étaient des esprits du vent aux griffes acérées.
explanation_en: Harpies were wind spirits with sharp claws.

question_fr: Dans la plupart des traditions, qui était l'épouse de Zeus ?
question_en: In most traditions, who was the wife of Zeus?
choices_fr: A) Aphrodite | B) Héra | C) Athéna | D) Hestia
choices_en: A) Aphrodite | B) Hera | C) Athena | D) Hestia
explanation_fr: Héra était la déesse du mariage et reine de l'Olympe.
explanation_en: Hera was the goddess of marriage and queen of Olympus.

question_fr: Dans la mythologie grecque, qui est le dieu du vin ?
question_en: In Greek mythology, who is the god of wine?
choices_fr: A) Héphaïstos | B) Dionysos | C) Déméter | D) Apollon
choices_en: A) Hephaestus | B) Dionysus | C) Demeter | D) Apollo
explanation_fr: Dionysos était aussi le dieu de la fête et de l'ivresse.
explanation_en: Dionysus was also the god of festivity and ecstasy.

question_fr: Qui était le roi des dieux dans la mythologie grecque antique ?
question_en: Who was the King of Gods in Ancient Greek mythology?
choices_fr: A) Apollon | B) Zeus | C) Hermès | D) Poséidon
choices_en: A) Apollo | B) Zeus | C) Hermes | D) Poseidon
explanation_fr: Zeus régnait sur l'Olympe et les cieux.
explanation_en: Zeus ruled over Olympus and the heavens.

question_fr: Les corbeaux d'Odin s'appellent 'Huginn' et 'Muninn'. Que signifient leurs noms ?
question_en: Odin's pet crows are named 'Huginn' and 'Muninn'. What do their names mean?
choices_fr: A) Pouvoir et Paix | B) Pensée et Mémoire | C) Guerre et Savoir | D) Sommeil et Éveil
choices_en: A) Power & Peace | B) Thought & Memory | C) War & Learning | D) Sleeping & Waking
explanation_fr: Huginn (pensée) et Muninn (mémoire) rapportaient les nouvelles du monde à Odin.
explanation_en: Huginn (thought) and Muninn (memory) brought news of the world to Odin.

question_fr: Dans la mythologie nordique, quel serpent ronge les racines d'Yggdrasil ?
question_en: In Norse mythology, what is the name of the serpent which eats the roots of Yggdrasil?
choices_fr: A) Bragi | B) Nídhögg | C) Odin | D) Ymir
choices_en: A) Bragi | B) Nidhogg | C) Odin | D) Ymir
explanation_fr: Nídhögg ronge les racines de l'arbre-monde Yggdrasil.
explanation_en: Nidhogg gnaws at the roots of the world tree Yggdrasil.

question_fr: Quel était le nom grec de Neptune ?
question_en: Neptune's greek name was...
choices_fr: A) Arès | B) Poséidon | C) Zeus | D) Apollon
choices_en: A) Ares | B) Poseidon | C) Zeus | D) Apollo
explanation_fr: Poséidon (grec) et Neptune (romain) sont le même dieu de la mer.
explanation_en: Poseidon (Greek) and Neptune (Roman) are the same sea god.

question_fr: Quel personnage grec est descendu aux Enfers pour ramener sa femme Eurydice ?
question_en: Which Greek figure traveled to the underworld to return his wife Eurydice?
choices_fr: A) Hercule | B) Orphée | C) Persée | D) Dédale
choices_en: A) Hercules | B) Orpheus | C) Perseus | D) Daedalus
explanation_fr: Orphée a charmé Hadès avec sa musique.
explanation_en: Orpheus charmed Hades with his music.

question_fr: Quel dieu nordique possède un cheval nommé Sleipnir ?
question_en: Which Norse God has a horse named Sleipnir?
choices_fr: A) Thor | B) Odin | C) Frigg | D) Balder
choices_en: A) Thor | B) Odin | C) Frigg | D) Balder
explanation_fr: Sleipnir est un cheval à huit pattes, fils de Loki.
explanation_en: Sleipnir is an eight-legged horse, son of Loki.

question_fr: Qui est le fils du dieu Loki ?
question_en: Who is the God Loki's son?
choices_fr: A) Odin | B) Fenrir | C) Hel | D) Sigyn
choices_en: A) Odin | B) Fenrir | C) Hel | D) Sigyn
explanation_fr: Fenrir est le loup géant destiné à tuer Odin lors du Ragnarök.
explanation_en: Fenrir is the giant wolf destined to kill Odin at Ragnarök.

question_fr: Qui était le dieu romain du feu ?
question_en: Who was the Roman god of fire?
choices_fr: A) Apollon | B) Vulcain | C) Jupiter | D) Mercure
choices_en: A) Apollo | B) Vulcan | C) Jupiter | D) Mercury
explanation_fr: Vulcain était le forgeron des dieux romains.
explanation_en: Vulcan was the blacksmith of the Roman gods.

question_fr: Combien de têtes a Cerbère ?
question_en: How many heads does Cerberus have?
explanation_fr: Cerbère est le chien à trois têtes gardien des Enfers.
explanation_en: Cerberus is the three-headed dog guarding the Underworld.

question_fr: Quel dieu grec n'a pas changé de nom à Rome ?
question_en: Who was the only god from Greece who did not get a name change in Rome?
choices_fr: A) Déméter | B) Apollon | C) Zeus | D) Athéna
choices_en: A) Demeter | B) Apollo | C) Zeus | D) Athena
explanation_fr: Apollon a gardé son nom grec dans la mythologie romaine.
explanation_en: Apollo kept his Greek name in Roman mythology.

question_fr: Quelle créature mythologique est mi-homme mi-cheval ?
question_en: Which mythological creature is said to be half-man and half-horse?
choices_fr: A) Minotaure | B) Centaure | C) Pégase | D) Gorgone
choices_en: A) Minotaur | B) Centaur | C) Pegasus | D) Gorgon
explanation_fr: Les centaures avaient un buste humain et un corps de cheval.
explanation_en: Centaurs had a human torso and a horse body.

question_fr: Comment s'appelait le dieu romain de la guerre ?
question_en: The ancient Roman god of war was commonly known as which of the following?
choices_fr: A) Jupiter | B) Mars | C) Junon | D) Arès
choices_en: A) Jupiter | B) Mars | C) Juno | D) Ares
explanation_fr: Mars était l'équivalent romain d'Arès grec.
explanation_en: Mars was the Roman equivalent of Greek Ares.
